task: Can you show me the page with the filing fee for a self-petitioned I-140 application?
graderReasoning: The agent reached the official USCIS Fee Schedule page filtered for Form I-140 at https://www.uscis.gov/g-1055?form=i-140. The final snapshot clearly shows the I-140 fee table, including the self-petitioner category under Additional Fees: Asylum Program Fee, with general filing fees of $715 paper / $665 online and $300 additional fee for 'Small Employer or self-petitioner.' This satisfies the request to show the page with the filing fee for a self-petitioned I-140 application.
final_result_response:
I have the USCIS fee schedule page open here:

https://www.uscis.gov/g-1055?form=i-140

For Form I-140 self-petitioner, it shows:

- Paper filing fee: $715 + $300 Asylum Program Fee = $1,015 total
- Online filing fee: $665 + $300 Asylum Program Fee = $965 total

The page is titled “G-1055, Fee Schedule” and is filtered to “I-140, Immigrant Petition for Alien Workers.”
action_history: Opening USCIS site: const p1 = await openTab('https://www.uscis.gov/');
Searching USCIS for I-140 filing fee: await page.locator('e5').fill('I-140 filing fee self petition');
Searching USCIS for I-140 filing fee: await page.locator('e6').click();
Opening USCIS Form I-140 page: await page.locator('e97').click();
Opening Filing Fee section: await page.locator('e43').click();
Opening USCIS Fee Schedule: await page.locator('e107').click();

screenshots.title: Searching USCIS for I-140 filing fee
